# Botrun 波特人 — 完整文件

> Botrun 波特人是台灣卡米爾公司開發的企業 AI 平台。
> 上傳 PDF 建立知識庫問答、不寫程式建立自訂 Bot、支援地端部署。
> 政府部會（內政部、數位部、法務部）與企業已導入使用。

---

## 首頁
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai

# Botrun 波特人

台灣本土的企業 AI 平台，由卡米爾股份有限公司（CAMEO INC.）開發。
不用寫程式，就能建立你的專屬 AI Bot。

## 四大核心能力

專屬知識庫 — 上傳 PDF/DOCX/CSV，用中文問答就能找到答案，回答附引證來源

自訂 AI Bot — 透過 Hatcher 建立器，填表單就能打造專屬 Bot，分享給同事使用

Agentic AI 多代理模式 — Bot 自主規劃任務、組合工具、即時修正，一個指令完成搜尋＋分析＋繪圖＋報告

資料不外洩 — 可部署在你自己的機房，完全不出內網，符合政府資安規範

詳細功能說明 → 功能總覽

## 誰在用 Botrun？

Botrun 符合「行政院及所屬機關（構）使用生成式 AI 參考指引」，已有多個政府部會與機構導入：

內政部 · 數位部 · 數位發展部 · 立法院 · 環境部 · 環管署 · 公共工程委員會 · 僑委會 · 食藥署 · 教育部 · 國網中心 · 慈濟

亮點成效：

| 機關 | 應用 | 成效 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 內政部 | AI 輔助 SQL 開發 | 開發時間從兩天→三小時 |
| 數位部 | 計畫書審議 | 效率提升 6 倍 |
| 環境部 | Airbot 環保應變 | 榮獲智慧城市創新應用獎 |
| 百萬公文 | 語意檢索 | 幾秒內找到相關文件 |

完整導入案例 → 導入指南

## 為什麼選 Botrun？

| 需求 | ChatGPT | Botrun |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 公司機密文件 | 資料上傳至 OpenAI 伺服器 | 部署在你的機房，資料不出內網 |
| 建立專屬 Bot | GPTs 自訂有限 | Hatcher 完整自訂（模型+知識庫+工具） |
| 處理速度 | 約 15 秒 | 快 5 倍，約 3 秒 |
| 政府合規 | 需額外評估 | 符合行政院生成式 AI 參考指引 |
| 台灣本土模型 | 無 | 支援 TAIDE 台灣模型 |

## 開始使用

服務平台：botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai)

客製化方案：依資料機敏性、部署方式、使用人數規劃

聯繫諮詢：service@cameo.tw

## 聯絡資訊

公司：卡米爾股份有限公司（CAMEO INC.）

官方介紹：intro.botrun.ai (https://intro.botrun.ai)

影片教學：波特人操作教學 (https://www.youtube.com/@botrunai/videos)｜政府 AI 應用平臺教學 (https://www.youtube.com/@TryAI%E7%84%A1%E4%BA%BA%E6%95%99%E5%AE%A4%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E6%95%99%E5%AD%B8)

獲獎：第 11 屆智慧城市創新應用獎、2024 SMART 20 AWARDS

詳見功能總覽 ｜ 常見問答

## 功能
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/features/index.html

# 波特人功能總覽

波特人（Botrun）的功能分為三個層次，點擊進入各層詳細說明：

## 第一層：原生波特人 — 進入就能用

不需任何設定，進入 botrun.ai 就有的能力：搜尋、PDF 分析、圖片辨識、AI 繪圖、圖表、網頁製作、語音輸入。外部工具呼叫約 3 秒，比 ChatGPT GPTs 快 5 倍。

詳細說明 → 原生波特人功能

## 第二層：孵化器（Hatcher）— 自己建 Bot

不用寫程式，填表單就能打造專屬 Bot：定義角色、上傳知識庫（RAG）、勾選 MCP 工具、開啟多代理模式。內政部「波孵」用它把簽證審查從 3 小時縮短至 30 秒。

詳細說明 → 孵化器功能

## 第三層：平台能力 — 分享、匯出、部署

Bot 分享給同事、API 串接到你的系統、.botrun 編譯匯出成 Python、地端部署資料不出內網。

詳細說明 → 平台能力

## 19 個波特人 Bot

波特人平台提供 19 個專業 Bot，涵蓋六大分類：

### 原生 Bot

| 名稱 | 功能 |
| --- | --- |
| 原生波特人 | 任意對話、呼叫其他 Bot、多代理工具 |

### 聲音與語言精靈

| 名稱 | 功能 |
| --- | --- |
| 波逐字稿 | 音檔轉文字、紀錄摘要 |
| 波翻譯 | 多國語言翻譯 |
| 波臺德 | 直接與臺德語言模型對談 |
| 波Youtube | Youtube 字幕轉逐字稿與摘要 |

### 文字魔法師

| 名稱 | 功能 |
| --- | --- |
| 波分段 | 長段落分段整理重點 |
| 波新聞稿 | 模仿範例撰寫新聞稿 |
| 波公文 | 公文撰寫、除錯、潤飾 |
| 波提示工程 | 優化提示工程內容 |
| 波簡報 | 產生精彩簡報 |

### 創意畫匠

| 名稱 | 功能 |
| --- | --- |
| 波繪圖 | 文字生成圖片 |
| 波畫室 | 引導式精緻繪圖 |
| 波流程圖 | 心智圖、流程圖、甘特圖 |
| 波網頁 | 設計網頁並產生連結 |

### 文件與數據

| 名稱 | 功能 |
| --- | --- |
| 波文件問答 | 多格式文件上傳問答 |
| 波數據分析 | CSV/Excel 數據視覺化 |
| 波會議記錄 | 文字整理成會議紀錄 |
| 波旅程地圖 | 機關痛點旅程地圖報告 |

### 程式碼

| 名稱 | 功能 |
| --- | --- |
| 波程 | 程式碼瀏覽與問題解決 |

## 導入指南
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/getting-started/index.html

# 波特人導入之旅

你的組織想導入 AI，但不知道從哪裡開始？這篇指南帶你走過從「第一次接觸」到「AI 全面落地」的完整旅程。

每個階段都有真實的政府部會案例，讓你知道別人怎麼做、踩過什麼坑、最後達成什麼成效。

## 導入四站

| 階段 | 時程 | 說明 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 一、發現與評估 | 1-2 週 | 聯繫團隊、免費試用、情境驗證 |
| 二、高品味題庫 | 2-4 週 | 導入成功的關鍵方法論 |
| 三、黑客松實作 | 半天～三天 | 帶真實資料現場驗證 |
| 四、教育訓練與優化 | 2-4 週 | 上線、學習、持續擴展 |

## 一、發現與評估（1-2 週）

你的問題： 我們單位想導入 AI，但不確定適不適合？要準備什麼？

### 你可以做什麼

聯繫波特人團隊：說明你的需求，團隊會在 2-3 天內回覆

試用：到 botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai) 註冊，免費試用 1 個月

開始情境驗證：依照各單位情境不同，進行需求流程驗證

### 真實案例：審計部怎麼找到波特人的

審計部顏先生在政府採購網的決標公告上看到波特人公司，打電話詢問 AI 導入應用。波特人團隊在兩天內回電，安排需求訪談，確認審計部的 AI 應用方向。

不需要一開始就想好所有需求。先帶著你最想解決的一個問題來聊，波特人團隊會幫你釐清 AI 能幫上什麼忙。

### AI 導入優先度評估

用三個維度快速判斷哪些工作最適合優先導入 AI：

| 維度 | 問題 |
| --- | --- |
| 頻率 | 問題頻繁發生？ |
| 耗時 | 人工解決耗時？ |
| 可行 | AI 實作時間短？ |

三個都是（+）→ 高優先，趕緊做。

### 評估清單

| 你關心的問題 | 波特人的回答 |
| --- | --- |
| 資料會不會外洩？ | 支援地端部署，資料完全不出內網 |
| 符合政府法規嗎？ | 符合行政院 AI 指引，多個部會已通過資安審查 |
| 要不要會寫程式？ | 不用。透過 Hatcher 介面拖拉設定就能建 Bot |
| 費用怎麼算？ | 按量計費＋封頂機制，小額採購 4.9 萬免評選 |
| 有沒有人用過？ | 內政部、數位部、法務部、國科會等多個部會已導入 |

## 定價與採購方式

| 採購方式 | 金額範圍 | 流程 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 免費試用 | 0 元 | 註冊即可，試用 1 個月 |
| 小額採購 | 4.9 萬以下 | 免評選、免開標 |
| 字元包 | 依用量計費 + 封頂 | 「問一次四台幣，四十八萬封頂」 |
| 年度合約 | 客製報價 | 含教育訓練、人本大使、技術支援 |

給機關承辦人的建議： 先用免費試用做內部評估，再用小額採購買字元包讓一個部門試跑，有成效再爭取年度預算。

## 下一步

想試試看？ → 到 botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai) 免費註冊

想了解更多功能？ → 看功能介紹

有其他問題？ → 看常見問題

想直接聯繫？ → service@cameo.tw / 02-2912-5028

## FAQ
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/faq/index.html

# Botrun 常見問答

## Botrun 波特人是什麼？

Botrun 波特人是由卡米爾股份有限公司（CAMEO INC.）開發的企業 AI 平台。不用寫程式，就能建立專屬 AI Bot，支援知識庫問答、多代理任務、地端部署。

詳細功能 → 功能總覽

## 可以免費體驗嗎？

可以。新客戶通過審核後享有 1 個月免費試用。前往 botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai) 註冊即可。

## 費用如何計算？

Botrun 提供客製化方案，依專案需求規劃（資料機敏性、部署方式、使用人數、教育訓練需求）。目前無公開固定定價，需聯繫團隊諮詢。

採購方式詳情 → 導入指南

## 波特人與 ChatGPT 有什麼不同？

| 面向 | ChatGPT | Botrun 波特人 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 知識庫 | 依賴訓練資料和網路搜尋 | 可上傳自有檔案建立專屬知識庫（RAG） |
| 自訂性 | GPTs 有限自訂 | Hatcher 完整自訂（模型、提示詞、知識庫、MCP 工具） |
| 資料安全 | 上傳至 OpenAI 伺服器 | 支援地端部署，資料不離開內部網路 |
| 部署方式 | 僅雲端 | 雲端 + 地端（Docker 隔離） |
| 政府合規 | 需額外評估 | 符合行政院生成式 AI 參考指引 |

## 聯絡方式

服務平台：botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai)

官方介紹：intro.botrun.ai (https://intro.botrun.ai)

影片教學：波特人操作教學 (https://www.youtube.com/@botrunai/videos)｜政府 AI 應用平臺教學 (https://www.youtube.com/@TryAI%E7%84%A1%E4%BA%BA%E6%95%99%E5%AE%A4%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E6%95%99%E5%AD%B8)

聯繫諮詢：service@cameo.tw

公司：卡米爾股份有限公司（CAMEO INC.）

---

## 原生波特人
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/features/native.html

# 原生波特人

不用孵化、不用設定，進入 botrun.ai 就能直接使用的所有功能。

打開波特人，你馬上就有一個全能的 AI 助理。內建 7 大能力：

即時搜尋 · PDF 深度分析 · 多圖辨識 · AI 圖片生成 · 互動式圖表 · 流程與架構圖 · 客製化網頁

## 即時搜尋

問最新消息，AI 幫你上網查，回答附來源引用。

### 你可以做什麼

問「台積電今天股價多少？」、「明天台北天氣如何？」

AI 透過 Perplexity 進行深度搜尋

回答附上來源引用（Citations），確保資訊可追溯

支援同時搜尋文字與圖片

### 使用方式

直接在對話中問即時問題，波特人會自動判斷是否需要上網搜尋。

## PDF 深度分析

上傳 PDF，AI 幫你讀完並回答問題。

### 你可以做什麼

上傳大型 PDF 檔案（系統自動壓縮與分段處理）

針對合約、論文、報告進行問答

總結重點、擷取特定數據

比較多份文件的差異

### 使用方式

拖拉或點擊上傳 PDF（上限 200MB），然後用自然語言提問。

## 多圖辨識

上傳多張圖片，AI 一次辨識和分析。

### 你可以做什麼

同時上傳多張圖片

辨識圖中的物件、文字、人物

解讀圖表數據（長條圖、圓餅圖等）

根據圖片內容進行創意發想或比較分析

### 使用方式

上傳圖片，告訴波特人你想了解什麼。

## AI 圖片生成

用文字描述，AI 生成高品質圖片。

### 你可以做什麼

描述你想要的圖片（越詳細越好）

AI 使用 DALL-E 3 技術生成

支援擬真照片和各種藝術風格

產出的圖片有永久連結，不會過期

### 使用方式

在對話中描述你想要的畫面。例如：「畫一張夕陽下的台北 101，水彩風格」。

## 互動式圖表

給波特人數據，它幫你做出可互動的圖表。

### 你可以做什麼

折線圖：趨勢分析、時間序列

圓餅圖：比例分布

散佈圖：相關性分析

熱點圖：密度分布

3D 圖表：立體數據呈現

地理地圖：地理位置資料視覺化

### 特色

產出的是互動式 HTML（使用 Plotly），你可以在瀏覽器中縮放、點選數據點、懸停查看數值。

### 使用方式

直接貼上數據或上傳 CSV，告訴波特人你想看什麼圖。

## 流程與架構圖

AI 幫你畫專業的流程圖、架構圖、甘特圖。

### 支援的圖表類型

| 圖表類型 | 適合場景 |
| --- | --- |
| 流程圖（Flowchart） | 系統架構、決策流程 |
| 循序圖（Sequence Diagram） | API 互動、系統溝通 |
| 甘特圖（Gantt Chart） | 專案進度排程 |
| ER 圖（ER Diagram） | 資料庫關聯設計 |
| 心智圖（Mind Map） | 腦力激盪、概念整理 |

### 使用方式

描述你的流程或架構，波特人用 Mermaid 語法自動產出圖表。

## 客製化網頁

AI 直接寫出完整網頁，附永久連結。

### 你可以做什麼

AI 撰寫完整的 HTML 頁面

自動整合 Tailwind CSS（美化）、Alpine.js（互動）、Chart.js（圖表）

產出的網頁有永久連結，不會過期

適合快速做出簡報頁面、資料儀表板、活動頁面

### 使用方式

描述你想要的網頁，波特人會直接產出。例如：「幫我做一個專案進度看板網頁」。

## 精確時間

波特人隨時知道現在的台北標準時間（UTC+8），處理「今天」「下週」「去年」等相對時間不會搞混。

## 下一步

想自己建 Bot？ → 看孵化器功能

想了解平台能力？ → 看平台能力

---

## 孵化器
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/features/hatcher.html

# 孵化器（Hatcher）— 自己建 Bot

孵化器是把「通用 AI」變成「你的專屬數位員工」的地方。

原生波特人什麼都能做一點，但孵化器讓你針對特定業務情境，打造一個專精某件事的 AI Bot——它知道你的術語、遵守你的規則、只用你指定的工具。

## 成功案例：內政部「波孵」— 簽證審查 30 秒完成

情境： 宗禮司每年審查大量外籍人士來台研修案，每案人工審查需要 3 小時。

孵化器設定：

角色：簽證審查專員

知識庫：八類公文草稿範本、審核表格範本

工具：PDF 分析（辨識護照）、自動文件合併（「迴文針」功能）

Bot 能做的事：

上傳申請文件（最多 10 人團體）

自動辨識護照中的姓名、護照號碼、出生年月日

自動比對台灣參與比例（需達 50%）

產出完整公文（3 頁）+ 審核表格（1 頁）

自動生成「長官核稿清單」含頁碼對照

成效： 人工 3 小時 → AI 30 秒至 1 分鐘

## 孵化器是什麼？

孵化器（Hatcher）是波特人的 Bot 建立器。它像一個「AI 實驗室」：你定義角色、知識、工具，孵化器幫你組裝出一個專屬的 AI 助理。

不需要寫程式。 整個過程就是填表單、上傳檔案、勾選工具。

### 原生波特人 vs 孵化出的 Bot

|  | 原生波特人 | 孵化出的 Bot |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 誰能用 | 所有人，進入就能用 | 你建的，可分享給指定的人 |
| 知識範圍 | 通用知識 + 網路搜尋 | 通用知識 + 你上傳的專屬文件 |
| 行為規則 | 平台預設 | 你定義的角色、語氣、限制 |
| 工具能力 | 平台預設工具 | 你選擇的工具組合 |
| 適合場景 | 臨時問答、快速分析 | 反覆使用的專業流程 |

## 你可以設定什麼

孵化器的設定分為五個區塊：

### 一、基本設定

| 設定 | 說明 | UI 標籤 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Bot 名稱 | 給你的 Bot 一個好記的名字 | 「名稱」 |

### 二、提示工程（最核心的部分）

提示詞模板是 Bot 的「大腦指令」，定義它是誰、怎麼說話、能做什麼不能做什麼。

你可以在提示詞中設定：

| 設定面向 | 說明 | 範例 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 角色定義 | Bot 的身份和專業 | 「你是內政部的 SQL 專家，專門處理人口統計資料庫查詢」 |
| 互動規則 | 對話風格和氛圍 | 「使用台灣繁體中文，語氣溫暖但專業」 |
| 限制條件 | 不能做的事 | 「禁止使用簡體字」「不做法律解釋，只引導到主責機關」 |
| 任務目標 | Bot 存在的目的 | 「幫使用者把自然語言描述轉成可執行的 SQL 查詢」 |
| 輸出格式 | 回答的結構 | 「每次回答都附上引用的法條編號」 |

### 三、Bot 機制

| 模式 | 說明 | 適合場景 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 基礎模式 | 純對話，直接用提示詞回應 | 單純問答、文字處理 |
| 多代理模式（Agent） | 可呼叫工具，自主判斷何時用哪個工具 | 需要上網、分析檔案、產出圖表的複合任務 |

選擇多代理模式後，Bot 獲得「自主思考」能力——它會判斷你的問題需要哪些工具，自動組合執行。

模型選擇：基礎模式和多代理模式有各自獨立的模型池，你可以為不同需求選擇最適合的模型。

### 四、MCP 工具箱（僅多代理模式）

勾選你要給 Bot 的工具。目前支援 8 個 MCP 應用：

| 應用名稱 | 特色 |
| --- | --- |
| Google Drive MCP | 雲端文件即時讀取與協作 |
| Cloud File MCP | 雲端主機檔案的讀寫與修改 |
| Remote PDF MCP | 公開 PDF 文件的讀取與組合應用 |
| 遠端網頁 MCP | 網頁內容的即時爬取與擷取 |
| SQLite MCP | 快速、精準的結構化資料查詢 |
| Perplexity MCP | 即時網路資訊整合 |
| Playwright MCP | 網頁自動化操作與測試 |
| Google Maps MCP | 具備地理空間概念的精準搜尋 |

多個工具可以組合使用。例如：Bot 先用 Perplexity 搜尋資料，再用 Remote PDF 讀取文件，最後整理成報告。

### 五、知識庫

上傳你的專屬文件，Bot 會根據這些資料回答問題。

| 功能 | 說明 |
| --- | --- |
| 新增檔案 | 上傳多個檔案（上限 200MB） |
| 支援格式 | PDF、Word、CSV、Excel 等 |
| 語意搜尋 | Bot 用向量搜尋找到最相關的內容 |
| 引證來源 | 回答時標註出處，可驗證 |
| 網域過濾 | 限制搜尋結果只來自指定網站 |

## 建立步驟（5 分鐘完成）
步驟 1：點選頂部導航列的「孵化器」分頁
  ↓
步驟 2：按「建立 BOT」
  ↓
步驟 3：填寫名稱（例如「內政部簽證審查」）
  ↓
步驟 4：撰寫提示工程（定義角色、規則、任務）
  ↓
步驟 5：選擇 BOT 機制
  ├── 基礎：純對話
  └── 多代理：可用工具 → 勾選 MCP 工具
  ↓
步驟 6：上傳知識庫檔案（可選）
  ↓
步驟 7：在右側測試區即時測試
  ↓
完成！系統每 3 秒自動儲存

儲存狀態指示：畫面會顯示「尚未儲存」→「儲存中」→「於 XX:XX 儲存成功！」

## 分享你的 Bot

| 功能 | 說明 |
| --- | --- |
| 複製專屬網址 | 一鍵複製，貼給同事就能用 |
| 指定分享 | 分享給特定使用者 |

對方收到連結後，會看到 Bot 的介紹頁面，點「新增並開啟對話」即可開始使用。

## 進階使用

### 搭配高品味題庫

孵化器 + 高品味題庫 是最佳組合：

在孵化器中建立 Bot，定義角色和工具

用高品味題庫提供範例（六欄位：動機、效益、提問、答案、原始資料、鑑別原則）

Bot 自動從範例中學會怎麼回答

不需要手工打磨提示詞，題庫做好了提示工程就完美了

## 孵化器常見問題

| 問題 | 解答 |
| --- | --- |
| 不會寫提示詞怎麼辦？ | 用高品味題庫提供範例，AI 自動學會 |
| 建立的 Bot 會被別人看到嗎？ | 不會，除非你主動分享 |
| 可以建幾個 Bot？ | 沒有數量限制 |
| 上傳的檔案有大小限制嗎？ | 單檔上限 200MB |
| 編輯到一半會遺失嗎？ | 不會，系統每 3 秒自動儲存 |
| 模型可以換嗎？ | 可以，基礎模式和多代理模式各有獨立模型池 |

## 下一步

想了解原生功能？ → 看原生波特人

想了解平台能力？ → 看平台能力

---

## 平台能力
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/features/platform.html

# 平台能力

## 分享與協作

### Bot 分享

| 功能 | 說明 |
| --- | --- |
| 獨佔 URL | 每個 Bot 有唯一連結（/b/BotID），複製就能分享 |
| 指定分享 | 分享給特定使用者 |
| 取消分享 | 隨時收回分享權限 |
| My Playbook | 瀏覽和複製他人的 Bot 設計 |
| 權限驗證 | 分享的 Bot 需通過權限檢查才能使用 |

### 對話分享

點擊對話頂部的分享按鈕

複製分享連結（會顯示「已複製分享連結！」）

對方打開連結即可看到完整對話（唯讀，路由 /s/:sessionId）

## .botrun 編譯匯出

在波特人設計好的 Bot，匯出成 Python，放到你自己的伺服器跑。

編譯為 Python：.botrun 檔案可編譯為 .py 腳本

OpenAI API 相容：編譯後程式碼可使用 OpenAI API 格式呼叫

litellm 相容：支援任意模型提供商（不限於 OpenAI）

無平台鎖定：編譯後可脫離 Botrun 平台獨立運行

版本控制：提示詞像程式碼一樣管理，支援 Git 追蹤

## 地端部署

裝在你的機房裡，資料完全不出內網。

| 方式 | 說明 |
| --- | --- |
| 雲端平台 | botrun.ai，網頁直接使用 |
| 地端部署 | 客戶自有機房，Docker 容器化部署 |

### 台灣三中心部署

波特人在台灣設有三個資料中心，確保資料主權與服務穩定：

| 地點 | 基礎設施 | 模型 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 臺北 | AWS | Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 |
| 新竹 | 國網中心 | Llama-4-Maverick, OpenAI gpt-oss 120B |
| 彰化 | Google | Anthropic Claude Haiku 4.5 |

### 開放模型 vs 商用模型

| 類型 | 說明 |
| --- | --- |
| 開放模型 | 使用開放模型（如 Llama-4-Maverick），部署在國網中心，免費使用 |
| 商用模型 | 使用商業模型（如 Claude Sonnet 4, Claude Haiku 4.5），需付費 |

### 部署特色

Docker-in-Docker 隔離：每個使用者獨立的容器環境

無外網依賴：所有資料處理在內網完成

符合政府資安規範：通過多個部會資安審查

資料完全不出內網：符合「行政院 AI 指引」的封閉雲端要求

## 帳號與設定

### 登入方式

| 方式 | 說明 |
| --- | --- |
| Email + 密碼 | Firebase 帳號登入 |
| Google OAuth | Google 帳號一鍵登入 |
| 企業 SSO | 整合企業身份系統 |
| MFA 多因子驗證 | TOTP 驗證，可強制啟用 |
| 外部存取 | Token 驗證（LINE 等外部平台） |

### 個人設定

| 設定 | 說明 |
| --- | --- |
| 語音模型 | 選擇轉文字的 AI 模型（4 種可選） |
| 介面語言 | 繁體中文（zh-Hant）/ English |
| 閃電語音 | 錄音完自動發送 |
| 返回警告 | 離開對話前確認 |
| 深淺色主題 | 深色或淺色介面（Cookie 儲存） |

### 帳號資訊（唯讀）

會員帳號、所屬機關/部門

會員啟用日、到期日

前端/後端版本號

### Token 用量追蹤

全域 Token 使用統計

用量百分比顯示

最後更新時間標記

詳細用量分析連結

## 介面功能

### 側邊欄

Bot 池：顯示前 6 個 Bot（支援釘選、顯示更多）

近期對話列表：重新命名、刪除、選項管理

新增對話按鈕

### 系統公告

平台可發布公開公告，使用者登入後看到最新資訊。

## 下一步

想了解原生功能？ → 看原生波特人

想自己建 Bot？ → 看孵化器功能

---

## 高品味題庫
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/getting-started/knowledge-base.html

# 高品味題庫 — 導入成功的關鍵

AI 要怎麼學會我們單位的專業知識？怎麼確保 AI 回答的品質？

這是整趟導入之旅最重要的一站。

## 什麼是高品味題庫？

高品味題庫不是傳統的「問答集」，而是一套結構化的知識教材，讓 AI 能真正理解你的業務情境。

傳統做法是花大量時間寫提示工程（Prompt Engineering），告訴 AI 該怎麼回答。高品味題庫的做法不同——你把好的範例準備好，AI 會自動學會怎麼回答。

「你做完高品味題庫，提示工程就會完美了。Opus 4.6 會全自動看你的高品味題庫，幫你把提示工程寫出來，而且是泛化的、不會過度擬合的。」
— 泊寰（波特人技術長）

## 六欄位結構

每一筆題庫資料包含六個欄位：

| 欄位 | 內容 | 範例（國科會公文） |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1. 動機 | 為什麼要做這份工作？ | 「國科會核定某教授的研究計畫補助」 |
| 2. 效益評估 | 完成後達成什麼效益？ | 「公文產出時間從 2 小時縮短至 10 分鐘」 |
| 3. 提問（Q） | 使用者的實際提問，包含所有需要的參數 | 「請撰寫核定補助公文，受補助教授：王大明，金額：200 萬，計畫名稱：量子計算研究，機構：台大，期程：115 年 1 月至 12 月」 |
| 4. 答案（A） | 期望的完整產出 | 完整的核定補助公文範本 |
| 5. 原始資料 | 參考文件 | 過去的核定公文 PDF、相關法規 |
| 6. 鑑別原則 | 審查標準 | 「格式正確、金額無誤、法規引用正確、用語符合公文體例」 |

六個欄位不需要每個都填滿，但核心精神是：讓 AI 知道「為什麼做」「怎麼做」「做得好的標準是什麼」。

## 高品味題庫 vs 傳統 Prompt Engineering

|  | 傳統 Prompt Engineering | 高品味題庫 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 你要做的事 | 手工打磨提示詞，反覆測試調整 | 準備好的範例和評審標準 |
| 專業門檻 | 需要了解 AI 的運作方式 | 只需要了解自己的業務 |
| 擴展性 | 每個新任務都要重寫提示詞 | 新增題庫，AI 自動學會 |
| 品質穩定度 | 容易過度擬合特定案例 | 泛化能力強，新案例也能處理 |
| 誰來維護 | 需要 AI 工程師 | 業務人員就能更新題庫 |

## 怎麼建立你的第一份高品味題庫？

步驟一：選定一個情境

從你單位最常做、最耗時的工作開始。例如：
- 公文撰寫（核定補助、人事異動、採購案）
- 會議記錄整理
- 文件審查（申請案、環評案）
- 數據分析報告

步驟二：收集 5-10 個真實範例

找出過去做得好的成品。這些就是你的「答案（A）」欄位。

關鍵教訓：提問欄位必須包含完整參數。 國科會公文實測中發現，如果提問只寫「幫我寫核定補助公文」，AI 會亂填教授名稱和金額。正確做法是把所有該填的值都寫進提問。「即使是模擬的，你都必須模擬出跟真的感覺很像的真的樣子。」

步驟三：定義鑑別原則

找你單位的專家（科長、資深承辦人）來定義：什麼算「做得好」？檢查哪些項目？

步驟四：用 AI 協助擴展

有了 5-10 個真實範例後，可以用 AI 協助產生更多變化題目，再由專家審核。

步驟五：多輪迭代驗證

讓真實使用者試用，記錄每一輪的問答過程。最新的題庫格式支援：
- 多 Sheet：每個 Sheet 是一個完整任務
- 時間戳：記錄每輪迭代的時間
- 多輪對話：完整保留迭代過程，而非只保留最終結果

## 真實案例：國科會公文高品味題庫

背景： 國網中心過去兩年跟 7 個政府機關合作推 TAIDE 模型做公文，投入將近一億經費，全部失敗。國網中心轉向波特人，採用 Agentic AI + 高品味題庫的方式。

做法：

收集 100 份國科會真實公文（核定、退休案、採購案、函、公告、開會通知）

建立 5 個高品味題庫，採用多 Sheet、多輪對話、時間戳的新格式

每份題庫由業務人員填寫六欄位，AI 工程師協助結構化

建立自動評測系統，5 個維度打分：公文撰寫、OCR 精確度、法規引用、回應速度、繁中語感

成果：

TAIDE 原始模型基準線：約 50 分

波特人代理模型 + 高品味題庫：95 分

公文生成成本：350 元/份（vs 真人約 1,500 元，節省 77%）

## 真實案例：法務部全國法規智慧入口

背景： 全國法規資料庫一年有 1.2 億次查詢。法務部希望 AI 能用白話文幫民眾解釋法規、引導到對的機關。

高品味題庫的應用：

情境：民眾問「紅燈右轉會怎樣？」

AI 不只找到道路交通管理處罰條例，還要用白話文解釋、告知罰則、提醒相關注意事項

鑑別原則：禁止做法律解釋（只能引導）、必須引用正確法條、必須告知最新修法資訊

定價模式： 「問一次四台幣，四十八萬封頂」— 簡單到機關承辦人一聽就懂。

## 下一步

準備好了？ → 看黑客松實作驗證

想了解上線流程？ → 看教育訓練與優化

---

## 黑客松實作
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/getting-started/hackathon.html

# 黑客松實作驗證（半天～三天）

怎麼讓長官和同事看到 AI 真的有用？怎麼避免做出來沒人用？

## 為什麼要辦黑客松？

黑客松不是技術人員的專利。在波特人的導入流程中，黑客松是讓決策者親眼看到成果的最快方式。

過去的教訓： 團隊曾經「把 80 萬預算當 800 萬做」，投入大量資源卻沒有對準客戶需求。現在的 SOP 要求：處長級以上決策者必須親自參與，帶著真實資料現場實作。

## 三個級別的黑客松

| 級別 | 時間 | 適合誰 | 你會得到什麼 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 體驗場 | 半天（4 小時） | 初步評估的部門主管 | AI 可行性驗證 + 初步成本估算 |
| 實作場 | 一天（8 小時） | 認真想導入的處長級團隊 | 帶真實資料做出可展示的 POC |
| 深度場 | 三天 | 跨部門協作的大型導入 | 完整方案 + 上線規劃 + 簽約條件 |

## 黑客松怎麼進行？

事前準備（你需要做的）：

帶你最想解決的 1-3 個真實問題

帶真實的業務資料（PDF、Excel、舊公文等）

確保有決策權的人會參加

現場流程：

波特人導師說明 AI Play 平台操作

你上傳真實資料，現場建立高品味題庫

AI 當場產出結果（公文、分析報告、審查意見等）

你和專家評估：成果有沒有達到標準？

迭代修正，直到你滿意

事後跟進（7 天內）：

波特人團隊提供正式報價單

導入時程規劃

指派「人本大使」持續追蹤

## 真實案例：內政部宗禮司的黑客松

問題： 宗禮司每年要審查大量宗教團體申請案，外籍人士資料的 key-in 和核對特別耗時。

黑客松現場做了什麼：

上傳真實的申請案文件（護照影本、申請表）

AI 自動辨識外籍人士姓名、護照號碼、出生年月日

AI 自動計算台灣參與比例（需達 50%）

現場驗證：AI 辨識結果 vs 人工核對

使用者滿意度： 7-10 分。最大幫助是外籍人士資料辨識，大幅節省 key-in 與核對時間。

後續： 宗禮司處長親自籌款 24 萬字元包，並規劃 116 年度 480 萬續購預算。

## 下一步

還沒準備題庫？ → 看高品味題庫

準備上線了？ → 看教育訓練與優化

---

## 教育訓練與優化
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/getting-started/training.html

# 教育訓練與持續優化

我們單位的人年齡層偏高，學得會嗎？上線之後怎麼持續使用？

## 三種學習方式

### 方式一：無人教室（自學課程）

完全不需要有人帶領的自學課程。

設計特色：

一頁到底，往下滑就對了，不會迷路

打開頁面自動引導下一步

教練式鼓勵：左側欄即時回饋進度

灰色→彩色的證書進度條，讓你捨不得半途而廢

影片教學頻道：

波特人 AI 應用平臺操作教學 (https://www.youtube.com/@botrunai/videos)

政府 AI 應用平臺操作教學 (https://www.youtube.com/@TryAI%E7%84%A1%E4%BA%BA%E6%95%99%E5%AE%A4%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E6%95%99%E5%AD%B8)

### 方式二：現場教育訓練（講師帶領）

適合整個部門一起導入。

實際案例 — 內政部教育訓練規劃：

時間：3 月底至 4 月初，共 4 個半天

人數：26 人

內容：AI Play 平台操作 + 數據分析實作（使用真實 CSV 資料）

特色：不是聽講座，而是每個人打開電腦跟著做

### 方式三：內部三堂必修課

針對已經開始使用的團隊，確保每個人都達到基本能力。

心法課：AI 能做什麼、不能做什麼？怎麼跟 AI 協作？

實作課：四題實戰演練（每個人都要通過）

進階課：怎麼建立和維護高品味題庫

考核機制：員工上傳螢幕錄影，AI 自動打分。確保不只是「上過課」，而是「真的會用」。

## 持續優化

### 避免使用量下滑

中油的教訓： 800 萬案子、200 個使用者，上線三個月後使用量明顯下滑。原因是導入後沒有持續追蹤使用狀況。

波特人的「人本大使」機制：

每個導入客戶配一位「人本大使」

大使關注的不是成本控管，而是：「使用者愛用嗎？遇到什麼困難？」

定期追蹤使用數據，主動發現問題

### 持續優化題庫

高品味題庫不是做完就不動了。隨著業務變化，你需要：

定期新增新的業務情境

根據使用者回饋修正答案品質

更新鑑別原則（法規修改、流程調整）

## 從一個部門擴展到整個組織

成功的組織擴展通常遵循這個路徑：

單一部門先試跑 — 選一個痛點明確的部門做 POC，快速驗證成效

量化成果 — 用具體數字呈現節省的時間與成本，讓成效說話

培養種子教練 — 讓成功部門的人帶動其他部門，降低導入門檻

向上爭取資源 — 在主管會議展示成果，推動跨部門預算編列

## 下一步

還沒做題庫？ → 看高品味題庫

想辦黑客松？ → 看黑客松實作

---

## 功能與技術
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/faq/advanced.html

# 功能與技術

## 支援哪些檔案格式？

知識庫支援：PDF、DOCX、CSV、Excel。上傳後檔案會被轉為向量儲存，使用語意搜尋技術進行檢索。

## 支援哪些 AI 模型？

波特人同時支援開放模型與商用模型：

| 類型 | 說明 |
| --- | --- |
| 開放模型 | 如 Llama-4-Maverick，部署在國網中心，免費使用 |
| 商用模型 | 如 Claude Sonnet 4、Claude Haiku 4.5，需付費 |

使用者在建立 Bot 時可依需求選擇。開放模型適合一般用途；商用模型提供更高品質的回應。

## Botrun 跟 TAIDE 有什麼關係？

Botrun 整合了台灣本土 TAIDE 大型語言模型，推出 taide-botrun 融合模型：

融合後品質評分從 4.6 提升至 8.4（滿分 10）

TAIDE 是國科會支持的台灣本土模型

提供在地化的繁體中文 AI 能力

## 資料安全如何保障？

封閉雲端專區 — 獨立環境，與其他客戶隔離

地端部署 — Docker-in-Docker 隔離架構，資料完全留在客戶機房

多因素驗證（MFA） — 支援 TOTP，可強制啟用

企業 SSO — 整合企業身份系統

政府合規 — 符合「行政院及所屬機關（構）使用生成式 AI 參考指引」

## 對話介面有哪些功能？

除了 AI 能力，波特人的對話介面還提供：

語音輸入：按住錄音鍵，說完自動轉成文字

閃電語音模式：錄完直接發送，不用預覽

即時串流回應：SSE 串流，回答逐字顯示

檔案上傳：拖拉或點擊上傳（上限 200MB）

查看工具執行過程：展開看 AI 用了什麼工具、花了多久

複製和分享：複製 AI 回答、分享整段對話（唯讀連結）

對話管理：重新命名、刪除、查看歷史

深淺色主題：深色或淺色介面

## 如何讓 AI 回答更精準？

波特人推薦使用 COSTAR 提示詞架構：

| 元素 | 英文 | 說明 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| C | Context（情境） | 提供背景資訊與上下文 |
| O | Objective（目標） | 明確指出你要達成什麼 |
| S | Style（風格） | 指定寫作或回應風格 |
| T | Tone（語氣） | 設定語氣（正式、親切等） |
| A | Audience（對象） | 說明目標受眾是誰 |
| R | Response（回應格式） | 指定期望的輸出格式 |

指令越清楚 → 產出品質越好 → 人工修改越少 → 工作效率越高

---

# English Version

---

## Home
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/

# Botrun

Taiwan's enterprise AI platform, developed by CAMEO INC.
Build your custom AI Bot without writing code.

## Four Core Capabilities

Knowledge Base — Upload PDF/DOCX/CSV, ask questions in natural language, answers include source citations

Custom AI Bot — Use Hatcher builder to create custom Bots by filling forms, share with colleagues

Agentic AI Multi-Agent Mode — Bots autonomously plan tasks, combine tools, self-correct. One command completes search + analysis + charting + reporting

Data Security — Deploy on your own servers, completely air-gapped, compliant with government security standards

Detailed feature descriptions → Features Overview

## Who Uses Botrun?

Botrun complies with Taiwan's "Executive Yuan Guidelines for Government Use of Generative AI". Multiple government agencies have adopted it:

Ministry of the Interior · Ministry of Digital Affairs · Legislature · Ministry of Environment · Public Construction Commission · Overseas Community Affairs Council · FDA · Ministry of Education · National Center for High-performance Computing · Tzu Chi Foundation

Key results:

| Agency | Application | Results |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ministry of the Interior | AI-assisted SQL Development | Dev time from 2 days → 3 hours |
| Ministry of Digital Affairs | Proposal Review | Efficiency improved 6x |
| Ministry of Environment | Airbot Environmental Response | Won Smart City Innovation Award |
| Million Documents | Semantic Search | Found relevant docs in seconds |

Full case studies → Getting Started

## Why Choose Botrun?

| Need | ChatGPT | Botrun |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Confidential documents | Data uploaded to OpenAI servers | Deployed on your servers, data stays in your network |
| Custom Bot | GPTs limited customization | Hatcher full customization (model + knowledge base + tools) |
| Processing Speed | ~15 seconds | 5x faster, ~3 seconds |
| Government Compliance | Requires additional assessment | Compliant with Executive Yuan AI Guidelines |
| Taiwan Local Model | None | Supports TAIDE Taiwan model |

## Get Started

Platform: botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai)

Custom Solutions: Planned based on data sensitivity, deployment method, number of users

Contact: service@cameo.tw

## Contact Information

Company: CAMEO INC.

Official Site: intro.botrun.ai (https://intro.botrun.ai)

Video Tutorials: Botrun Tutorials (https://www.youtube.com/@botrunai/videos) | Government AI Platform Tutorials (https://www.youtube.com/@TryAI%E7%84%A1%E4%BA%BA%E6%95%99%E5%AE%A4%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E6%95%99%E5%AD%B8)

Awards: 11th Smart City Innovation Award, 2024 SMART 20 AWARDS

See Features Overview | FAQ

## Features
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/features/index.html

# Botrun Features Overview

Botrun's features are organized into three layers. Click through to see detailed descriptions of each:

## Layer 1: Native Botrun — Ready to Use Instantly

No setup required. Just visit botrun.ai and start using built-in capabilities: search, PDF analysis, image recognition, AI image generation, charts, web page creation, and voice input. External tool calls take about 3 seconds — 5x faster than ChatGPT GPTs.

Learn more → Native Botrun Features

## Layer 2: Hatcher (Bot Builder) — Build Your Own Bot

No coding required. Build your custom Bot by filling out a form: define a role, upload a knowledge base (RAG), select MCP tools, and enable multi-agent mode. Taiwan's Ministry of the Interior used Hatcher to reduce visa review time from 3 hours to 30 seconds.

Learn more → Hatcher Features

## Layer 3: Platform Capabilities — Sharing, Export, Deployment

Share Bots with colleagues, integrate via API, export as Python with .botrun compilation, and deploy on-premise so data never leaves your network.

Learn more → Platform Capabilities

## 19 Botrun Bots

The Botrun platform provides 19 specialized Bots across six categories:

### Native Bot

| Name | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Native Botrun | Free-form conversation, call other Bots, multi-agent tools |

### Voice & Language

| Name | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Bo Transcript | Audio-to-text transcription and summary |
| Bo Translate | Multi-language translation |
| Bo TAIDE | Direct conversation with Taiwan's TAIDE language model |
| Bo YouTube | YouTube subtitle extraction and summarization |

### Text Magic

| Name | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Bo Segment | Break long paragraphs into organized key points |
| Bo Press Release | Draft press releases based on templates |
| Bo Official Doc | Draft, proofread, and refine official documents |
| Bo Prompt | Optimize prompt engineering content |
| Bo Presentation | Generate compelling presentations |

### Creative Studio

| Name | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Bo Draw | Text-to-image generation |
| Bo Studio | Guided, refined image creation |
| Bo Flowchart | Mind maps, flowcharts, Gantt charts |
| Bo Web | Design web pages and generate live links |

### Documents & Data

| Name | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Bo Doc Q&A | Upload and query documents in multiple formats |
| Bo Data Analysis | CSV/Excel data visualization |
| Bo Meeting Notes | Organize text into meeting minutes |
| Bo Journey Map | Pain-point journey map reports for organizations |

### Code

| Name | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Bo Code | Code browsing and problem solving |

## Next Steps

Ready to get started? → See Getting Started

Have questions? → See FAQ

Want to try it out? → Sign up for free at botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai)

## Getting Started
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/getting-started/index.html

# Botrun Getting Started Journey

Your organization wants to adopt AI but doesn't know where to start? This guide walks you through the complete journey from "first contact" to "full-scale AI deployment."

Each stage includes real government agency case studies, so you can see how others did it, what pitfalls they encountered, and what results they achieved.

## Four Stages of Deployment

| Stage | Timeline | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1. Discovery & Evaluation | 1-2 weeks | Contact the team, free trial, scenario validation |
| 2. Quality Question Bank | 2-4 weeks | The key methodology for successful deployment |
| 3. Hackathon Validation | Half day to 3 days | Bring real data for on-site validation |
| 4. Training & Optimization | 2-4 weeks | Go live, learn, and continuously expand |

## 1. Discovery & Evaluation (1-2 weeks)

Your question: Our department wants to adopt AI, but we're not sure if it's the right fit. What do we need to prepare?

### What You Can Do

Contact the Botrun team: Describe your needs, and the team will respond within 2-3 days

Try it out: Register at botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai) for a free 1-month trial

Start scenario validation: Conduct requirement and workflow validation based on your specific use cases

### Real Case: How the National Audit Office Found Botrun

Mr. Yen from the National Audit Office discovered Botrun through a government procurement award notice. He called to inquire about AI adoption. The Botrun team called back within two days, arranged a requirements meeting, and confirmed the Audit Office's AI application direction.

You don't need to have all your requirements figured out from the start. Just bring the one problem you most want to solve, and the Botrun team will help you clarify how AI can help.

### AI Deployment Priority Assessment

Use three dimensions to quickly determine which tasks are best suited for AI adoption:

| Dimension | Question |
| --- | --- |
| Frequency | Does the problem occur frequently? |
| Time Cost | Is it time-consuming to solve manually? |
| Feasibility | Can AI implement it quickly? |

If all three are positive (+) — high priority, act now.

### Evaluation Checklist

| Your Concern | Botrun's Answer |
| --- | --- |
| Will our data leak? | Supports on-premise deployment; data never leaves your internal network |
| Does it comply with government regulations? | Compliant with Executive Yuan AI guidelines; multiple agencies have passed security audits |
| Do we need programming skills? | No. Build Bots through the Hatcher drag-and-drop interface |
| How is pricing calculated? | Pay-per-use with a cost cap; small purchases under 49K TWD require no evaluation committee |
| Has anyone used it before? | Multiple government agencies including Ministry of Interior, Ministry of Digital Affairs, Ministry of Justice, and National Science and Technology Council have adopted it |

## Pricing & Procurement

| Procurement Method | Amount Range | Process |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Free Trial | 0 TWD | Register and try for 1 month |
| Small Purchase | Under 49K TWD | No evaluation committee or bidding required |
| Character Packs | Pay-per-use + cap | "4 TWD per query, capped at 480K TWD" |
| Annual Contract | Custom quote | Includes training, Human-Centered Ambassador, technical support |

Advice for government procurement officers: Start with the free trial for internal evaluation, then use a small purchase to buy a character pack for one department to pilot. Once you see results, apply for annual budget.

## Next Steps

Want to try it? — Register for free at botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai)

Want to learn more about features? — See Features

Have other questions? — See FAQ

Want to contact us directly? — service@cameo.tw / 02-2912-5028

## FAQ
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/faq/index.html

# Botrun FAQ

## What is Botrun?

Botrun is an enterprise AI platform developed by CAMEO INC. Build your own AI Bot without coding — supports knowledge base Q&A, multi-agent tasks, and on-premises deployment.

See details → Features Overview

## Is there a free trial?

Yes. New customers get 1 month free trial after approval. Register at botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai).

## How is pricing calculated?

Botrun offers custom plans based on project needs (data sensitivity, deployment method, number of users, training requirements). There is no fixed public pricing — contact the team for a consultation.

Procurement details → Getting Started

## How is Botrun different from ChatGPT?

| Aspect | ChatGPT | Botrun |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Knowledge Base | Relies on training data and web search | Upload your own files to build a dedicated knowledge base (RAG) |
| Customization | GPTs with limited customization | Hatcher with full customization (models, prompts, knowledge base, MCP tools) |
| Data Security | Uploaded to OpenAI servers | Supports on-premises deployment — data stays within your network |
| Deployment | Cloud only | Cloud + on-premises (Docker isolation) |
| Government Compliance | Requires additional evaluation | Meets Taiwan Executive Yuan generative AI guidelines |

## Contact

Platform: botrun.ai (https://botrun.ai)

Introduction: intro.botrun.ai (https://intro.botrun.ai)

Video tutorials: Botrun tutorials (https://www.youtube.com/@botrunai/videos) | Government AI platform tutorials (https://www.youtube.com/@TryAI%E7%84%A1%E4%BA%BA%E6%95%99%E5%AE%A4%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E6%95%99%E5%AD%B8)

Email: service@cameo.tw

Company: CAMEO INC.

---

## Native Botrun
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/features/native.html

# Native Botrun

No setup, no configuration — all features available the moment you visit botrun.ai.

Open Botrun and you immediately have a full-featured AI assistant. It comes with 7 built-in capabilities:

Real-time Search · PDF Deep Analysis · Multi-Image Recognition · AI Image Generation · Interactive Charts · Flow & Architecture Diagrams · Custom Web Pages

## Real-time Search

Ask about the latest news — AI searches the web for you, with source citations included.

### What You Can Do

Ask questions like "What is TSMC's stock price today?" or "What's the weather tomorrow?"

AI performs deep search via Perplexity

Answers include source citations so information is traceable

Supports simultaneous text and image search

### How to Use

Simply ask real-time questions in the conversation. Botrun automatically determines whether a web search is needed.

## PDF Deep Analysis

Upload a PDF and let AI read it and answer your questions.

### What You Can Do

Upload large PDF files (automatically compressed and segmented)

Ask questions about contracts, papers, and reports

Summarize key points and extract specific data

Compare differences across multiple documents

### How to Use

Drag and drop or click to upload a PDF (up to 200MB), then ask questions in natural language.

## Multi-Image Recognition

Upload multiple images and let AI recognize and analyze them all at once.

### What You Can Do

Upload multiple images simultaneously

Identify objects, text, and people in images

Interpret chart data (bar charts, pie charts, etc.)

Generate creative ideas or comparative analysis based on image content

### How to Use

Upload images and tell Botrun what you want to know.

## AI Image Generation

Describe what you want in text, and AI generates high-quality images.

### What You Can Do

Describe the image you want (the more detail, the better)

AI generates images using DALL-E 3 technology

Supports photorealistic images and various art styles

Generated images have permanent links that never expire

### How to Use

Describe the scene you want in the conversation. For example: "Draw Taipei 101 at sunset in watercolor style."

## Interactive Charts

Give Botrun your data, and it creates interactive charts for you.

### What You Can Do

Line charts: trend analysis, time series

Pie charts: proportion distribution

Scatter plots: correlation analysis

Heatmaps: density distribution

3D charts: three-dimensional data visualization

Geographic maps: geolocation data visualization

### Highlights

Output is interactive HTML (using Plotly). You can zoom, click data points, and hover to view values in your browser.

### How to Use

Paste data directly or upload a CSV, and tell Botrun what chart you want to see.

## Flow & Architecture Diagrams

AI creates professional flowcharts, architecture diagrams, and Gantt charts for you.

### Supported Diagram Types

| Diagram Type | Best For |
| --- | --- |
| Flowchart | System architecture, decision processes |
| Sequence Diagram | API interactions, system communication |
| Gantt Chart | Project scheduling |
| ER Diagram | Database relationship design |
| Mind Map | Brainstorming, concept organization |

### How to Use

Describe your process or architecture, and Botrun automatically generates diagrams using Mermaid syntax.

## Custom Web Pages

AI writes a complete web page for you, with a permanent link.

### What You Can Do

AI creates complete HTML pages

Automatically integrates Tailwind CSS (styling), Alpine.js (interactivity), and Chart.js (charts)

Generated pages have permanent links that never expire

Great for quickly building presentation pages, data dashboards, and event pages

### How to Use

Describe the web page you want, and Botrun will generate it. For example: "Create a project progress dashboard web page for me."

## Precise Time

Botrun always knows the current Taipei Standard Time (UTC+8), so it never gets confused when handling relative time expressions like "today," "next week," or "last year."

## Next Steps

Want to build your own Bot? → See Hatcher Features

Want to learn about platform capabilities? → See Platform Capabilities

---

## Hatcher (Bot Builder)
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/features/hatcher.html

# Hatcher (Bot Builder) — Build Your Own Bot

Hatcher is where you turn "general-purpose AI" into "your dedicated digital employee."

Native Botrun can do a bit of everything, but Hatcher lets you build an AI Bot specialized for a specific business scenario — one that knows your terminology, follows your rules, and only uses the tools you specify.

## Case Study: Ministry of the Interior — Visa Review in 30 Seconds

Scenario: The Department of Civil Affairs reviews large volumes of foreign national study-in-Taiwan applications each year. Each case required 3 hours of manual review.

Hatcher configuration:

Role: Visa review specialist

Knowledge base: Eight types of official document draft templates and review form templates

Tools: PDF analysis (passport recognition), automatic document merging ("paper clip" function)

What the Bot can do:

Upload application documents (up to 10-person groups)

Automatically recognize names, passport numbers, and dates of birth from passports

Automatically verify Taiwan participation ratio (must reach 50%)

Generate complete official documents (3 pages) + review forms (1 page)

Automatically create a "supervisor review checklist" with page number references

Result: Manual 3 hours → AI 30 seconds to 1 minute

## What Is Hatcher?

Hatcher is Botrun's Bot builder. Think of it as an "AI laboratory": you define the role, knowledge, and tools, and Hatcher assembles a custom AI assistant for you.

No coding required. The entire process is just filling out forms, uploading files, and selecting tools.

### Native Botrun vs. Hatched Bot

|  | Native Botrun | Hatched Bot |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Who can use it | Everyone, available instantly | You build it, share with specific people |
| Knowledge scope | General knowledge + web search | General knowledge + your uploaded documents |
| Behavior rules | Platform defaults | Your defined role, tone, and restrictions |
| Tool capabilities | Platform default tools | Your selected tool combination |
| Best for | Ad-hoc Q&A, quick analysis | Repeatable professional workflows |

## What You Can Configure

Hatcher's configuration is divided into five sections:

### 1. Basic Settings

| Setting | Description | UI Label |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Bot Name | Give your Bot a memorable name | "Name" |

### 2. Prompt Engineering (The Core)

The prompt template is the Bot's "brain instructions" — it defines who the Bot is, how it speaks, and what it can and cannot do.

You can configure the following in your prompt:

| Aspect | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Role Definition | The Bot's identity and expertise | "You are a SQL expert at the Ministry of the Interior, specializing in population statistics database queries" |
| Interaction Rules | Conversation style and tone | "Use Traditional Chinese (Taiwan), warm but professional tone" |
| Restrictions | What the Bot cannot do | "Do not provide legal interpretations, only direct users to the responsible agency" |
| Task Objective | The Bot's purpose | "Help users convert natural language descriptions into executable SQL queries" |
| Output Format | Response structure | "Always include the referenced regulation number in each response" |

### 3. Bot Mode

| Mode | Description | Best For |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Basic Mode | Pure conversation, responds directly using the prompt | Simple Q&A, text processing |
| Multi-Agent Mode | Can call tools, autonomously decides when to use which tool | Complex tasks requiring web search, file analysis, and chart generation |

When multi-agent mode is selected, the Bot gains "autonomous thinking" — it determines which tools your question requires and combines them automatically.

Model Selection: Basic mode and multi-agent mode each have their own independent model pool, so you can choose the most suitable model for each need.

### 4. MCP Toolbox (Multi-Agent Mode Only)

Select the tools you want to give your Bot. Currently supports 8 MCP applications:

| Application | Capability |
| --- | --- |
| Google Drive MCP | Real-time cloud document reading and collaboration |
| Cloud File MCP | Read, write, and modify files on cloud servers |
| Remote PDF MCP | Read and combine public PDF documents |
| Remote Web MCP | Real-time web content crawling and extraction |
| SQLite MCP | Fast, precise structured data queries |
| Perplexity MCP | Real-time web information aggregation |
| Playwright MCP | Web automation and testing |
| Google Maps MCP | Location-aware precise search |

Multiple tools can be combined. For example: a Bot first uses Perplexity to search for data, then uses Remote PDF to read documents, and finally compiles a report.

### 5. Knowledge Base

Upload your own documents, and the Bot will answer questions based on this data.

| Feature | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Add Files | Upload multiple files (up to 200MB each) |
| Supported Formats | PDF, Word, CSV, Excel, and more |
| Semantic Search | Bot uses vector search to find the most relevant content |
| Source Citations | Responses include source references for verification |
| Domain Filtering | Restrict search results to specified websites only |

## Build Steps (Done in 5 Minutes)
Step 1: Click the "Hatcher" tab in the top navigation bar
  ↓
Step 2: Click "Create BOT"
  ↓
Step 3: Enter a name (e.g., "Ministry of Interior Visa Review")
  ↓
Step 4: Write prompt engineering (define role, rules, tasks)
  ↓
Step 5: Choose BOT mode
  ├── Basic: Pure conversation
  └── Multi-Agent: Can use tools → Select MCP tools
  ↓
Step 6: Upload knowledge base files (optional)
  ↓
Step 7: Test in real-time using the right-side testing panel
  ↓
Done! The system auto-saves every 3 seconds

Save status indicator: The interface shows "Unsaved" → "Saving" → "Saved at XX:XX!"

## Share Your Bot

| Feature | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Copy Unique URL | One-click copy, paste to colleagues and they can use it |
| Targeted Sharing | Share with specific users |

When recipients open the link, they see the Bot's introduction page and can click "Add and Start Conversation" to begin using it.

## Advanced Usage

### Pairing with High-Taste Examples

Hatcher + High-Taste Examples is the best combination:

Create a Bot in Hatcher, defining the role and tools

Provide examples using High-Taste Examples (six fields: motivation, benefit, question, answer, source data, evaluation criteria)

The Bot automatically learns how to respond from the examples

No need to manually refine prompts — once the examples are ready, the prompt engineering is complete

## Hatcher FAQ

| Question | Answer |
| --- | --- |
| I don't know how to write prompts? | Use High-Taste Examples to provide examples, and AI learns automatically |
| Can others see my Bot? | No, unless you actively share it |
| How many Bots can I create? | No limit |
| Is there a file size limit? | 200MB per file |
| Will I lose my work mid-edit? | No, the system auto-saves every 3 seconds |
| Can I change the model? | Yes, basic mode and multi-agent mode each have independent model pools |

## Next Steps

Want to learn about native features? → See Native Botrun

Want to learn about platform capabilities? → See Platform Capabilities

---

## Platform Capabilities
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/features/platform.html

# Platform Capabilities

## Sharing & Collaboration

### Bot Sharing

| Feature | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Unique URL | Each Bot has a unique link (/b/BotID), copy and share |
| Targeted Sharing | Share with specific users |
| Revoke Sharing | Revoke sharing permissions at any time |
| My Playbook | Browse and clone other people's Bot designs |
| Permission Check | Shared Bots require permission verification before use |

### Conversation Sharing

Click the share button at the top of a conversation

Copy the share link (displays "Share link copied!")

Recipients can view the full conversation (read-only, route /s/:sessionId)

## .botrun Compilation Export

Design your Bot in Botrun, export it as Python, and run it on your own server.

Compile to Python: .botrun files can be compiled into .py scripts

OpenAI API compatible: Compiled code can use the OpenAI API format

litellm compatible: Supports any model provider (not limited to OpenAI)

No platform lock-in: Compiled code runs independently from the Botrun platform

Version control: Prompts can be managed like code, with Git tracking support

## On-Premise Deployment

Install in your own data center — data never leaves your network.

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Cloud Platform | botrun.ai, use directly via web browser |
| On-Premise | Customer's own data center, Docker containerized deployment |

### Three Data Centers in Taiwan

Botrun operates three data centers in Taiwan, ensuring data sovereignty and service stability:

| Location | Infrastructure | Model |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Taipei | AWS | Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 |
| Hsinchu | NCHC (National Center for High-performance Computing) | Llama-4-Maverick, OpenAI gpt-oss 120B |
| Changhua | Google | Anthropic Claude Haiku 4.5 |

### Open Models vs. Commercial Models

| Type | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Open Models | Uses open models (e.g., Llama-4-Maverick), deployed at NCHC, free to use |
| Commercial Models | Uses commercial models (e.g., Claude Sonnet 4, Claude Haiku 4.5), paid |

### Deployment Features

Docker-in-Docker isolation: Independent container environment for each user

No external network dependency: All data processing completed within the internal network

Government security compliant: Passed security audits from multiple government agencies

Data never leaves the network: Compliant with Taiwan's "Executive Yuan AI Guidelines" closed cloud requirements

## Account & Settings

### Login Methods

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Email + Password | Firebase account login |
| Google OAuth | One-click Google account login |
| Enterprise SSO | Integrate with enterprise identity systems |
| MFA Multi-Factor Auth | TOTP verification, can be enforced |
| External Access | Token authentication (LINE and other external platforms) |

### Personal Settings

| Setting | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Voice Model | Choose speech-to-text AI model (4 options) |
| Interface Language | Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant) / English |
| Flash Voice | Auto-send after recording |
| Navigation Warning | Confirm before leaving a conversation |
| Light/Dark Theme | Dark or light interface (stored in cookie) |

### Account Information (Read-only)

Member account, affiliated organization/department

Membership activation date, expiration date

Frontend/backend version numbers

### Token Usage Tracking

Global token usage statistics

Usage percentage display

Last updated timestamp

Detailed usage analysis link

## Interface Features

### Sidebar

Bot pool: Displays first 6 Bots (supports pinning and "show more")

Recent conversation list: Rename, delete, options management

New conversation button

### System Announcements

The platform can publish public announcements, visible to users upon login.

## Next Steps

Want to learn about native features? → See Native Botrun

Want to build your own Bot? → See Hatcher Features

---

## Quality Question Bank
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/getting-started/knowledge-base.html

# Quality Question Bank — The Key to Successful Deployment

How does AI learn our organization's domain expertise? How do we ensure the quality of AI responses?

This is the most important stop on the entire deployment journey.

## What Is a Quality Question Bank?

A Quality Question Bank is not a traditional "FAQ list" — it is a structured knowledge curriculum that enables AI to truly understand your business context.

The traditional approach is to spend a lot of time on Prompt Engineering, telling AI how to respond. The Quality Question Bank approach is different — you prepare good examples, and AI automatically learns how to respond.

"Once you complete the Quality Question Bank, your prompt engineering will be perfect. Opus 4.6 will automatically read your Quality Question Bank and write the prompt engineering for you — generalized and without overfitting."
— Bohan (Botrun CTO)

## Six-Field Structure

Each entry in the question bank contains six fields:

| Field | Content | Example (NSTC Official Document) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1. Motivation | Why is this task needed? | "NSTC approves a professor's research grant" |
| 2. Benefit Assessment | What benefits are achieved upon completion? | "Document production time reduced from 2 hours to 10 minutes" |
| 3. Question (Q) | The user's actual question, including all required parameters | "Please draft a grant approval document. Recipient: Prof. Da-Ming Wang, Amount: 2M TWD, Project: Quantum Computing Research, Institution: NTU, Period: Jan to Dec 2026" |
| 4. Answer (A) | The expected complete output | A complete grant approval document template |
| 5. Source Data | Reference documents | Past approval documents (PDF), related regulations |
| 6. Evaluation Criteria | Review standards | "Correct format, accurate amounts, proper legal citations, appropriate official document language" |

You don't need to fill in every field, but the core principle is: let AI know "why we're doing this," "how to do it," and "what good looks like."

## Quality Question Bank vs Traditional Prompt Engineering

|  | Traditional Prompt Engineering | Quality Question Bank |
| --- | --- | --- |
| What you do | Manually craft prompts, repeatedly test and adjust | Prepare good examples and evaluation criteria |
| Expertise required | Need to understand how AI works | Only need to understand your own business |
| Scalability | Rewrite prompts for every new task | Add to the question bank, AI learns automatically |
| Quality stability | Prone to overfitting specific cases | Strong generalization, handles new cases well |
| Who maintains it | Requires AI engineers | Business staff can update the question bank |

## How to Build Your First Quality Question Bank

Step 1: Choose a scenario

Start with the most frequent and time-consuming task in your department. For example:

Official document drafting (grant approvals, personnel changes, procurement)

Meeting minutes organization

Document review (applications, environmental impact assessments)

Data analysis reports

Step 2: Collect 5-10 real examples

Find past work that was done well. These become your "Answer (A)" field.

Key lesson: The question field must include complete parameters. During NSTC document testing, it was discovered that if the question only says "Help me write a grant approval document," AI will fill in random professor names and amounts. The correct approach is to include all values that need to be filled in the question. "Even if it's simulated, you must simulate it to look and feel like the real thing."

Step 3: Define evaluation criteria

Have your department's experts (section chiefs, senior staff) define: What counts as "well done"? What items should be checked?

Step 4: Use AI to help expand

Once you have 5-10 real examples, you can use AI to help generate more variations, then have experts review them.

Step 5: Multi-round iterative validation

Let real users try it out and record each round of Q&A. The latest question bank format supports:

Multiple Sheets: Each sheet is a complete task

Timestamps: Record the time of each iteration

Multi-turn conversations: Preserve the complete iteration process, not just the final result

## Real Case: NSTC Official Document Quality Question Bank

Background: Over the past two years, the National Center for High-Performance Computing (NCHC) collaborated with 7 government agencies to use the TAIDE model for official documents, investing nearly 100 million TWD — all of which failed. NCHC then turned to Botrun, adopting an Agentic AI + Quality Question Bank approach.

Approach:

Collected 100 real NSTC official documents (approvals, retirement cases, procurement, correspondence, announcements, meeting notices)

Built 5 Quality Question Banks using the new format with multiple sheets, multi-turn conversations, and timestamps

Each question bank was filled out by business staff using the six-field structure, with AI engineers assisting in structuring

Built an automated evaluation system scoring on 5 dimensions: document drafting, OCR accuracy, legal citation, response speed, and Traditional Chinese language quality

Results:

TAIDE original model baseline: ~50 points

Botrun agent model + Quality Question Bank: 95 points

Document generation cost: 350 TWD/document (vs ~1,500 TWD for manual work, saving 77%)

## Real Case: Ministry of Justice National Laws & Regulations Smart Portal

Background: The National Laws & Regulations Database receives 120 million queries per year. The Ministry of Justice wanted AI to explain laws in plain language and guide citizens to the right agency.

Quality Question Bank application:

Scenario: A citizen asks "What happens if I turn right on a red light?"

AI not only finds the Road Traffic Management and Penalty Act but also explains in plain language, states the penalty, and reminds about related considerations

Evaluation criteria: Must not provide legal interpretations (only guidance), must cite correct statutes, must inform about the latest amendments

Pricing model: "4 TWD per query, capped at 480K TWD" — simple enough for any procurement officer to understand immediately.

## Next Steps

Ready to go? — See Hackathon Validation

Want to learn about the launch process? — See Training & Optimization

---

## Hackathon
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/getting-started/hackathon.html

# Hackathon Validation (Half Day to 3 Days)

How do you show leadership and colleagues that AI actually works? How do you avoid building something nobody uses?

## Why Hold a Hackathon?

A hackathon isn't just for technical people. In Botrun's deployment process, a hackathon is the fastest way for decision-makers to see results firsthand.

Lessons learned: The team once "spent an 800K TWD budget as if it were 8M TWD," investing massive resources without aligning with customer needs. The current SOP requires: Director-level or above decision-makers must participate in person, bringing real data for on-site hands-on work.

## Three Levels of Hackathon

| Level | Duration | Best For | What You Get |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Experience | Half day (4 hours) | Department heads doing initial evaluation | AI feasibility validation + preliminary cost estimate |
| Workshop | Full day (8 hours) | Director-level teams serious about deployment | A demonstrable POC built with real data |
| Deep Dive | 3 days | Large-scale cross-department deployments | Complete solution + launch plan + contract terms |

## How Does a Hackathon Work?

Pre-event preparation (what you need to do):

Bring 1-3 real problems you most want to solve

Bring real business data (PDFs, Excel files, past documents, etc.)

Ensure someone with decision-making authority will attend

On-site process:

Botrun mentors explain how to use the AI Play platform

You upload real data and build a Quality Question Bank on-site

AI produces results on the spot (official documents, analysis reports, review opinions, etc.)

You and experts evaluate: Do the results meet the standard?

Iterate and refine until you're satisfied

Post-event follow-up (within 7 days):

Botrun team provides a formal quotation

Deployment timeline plan

A "Human-Centered Ambassador" is assigned for ongoing support

## Real Case: Ministry of Interior — Department of Civil Affairs Hackathon

Problem: The Department of Civil Affairs reviews a large volume of religious organization applications each year. Data entry and verification of foreign nationals' information was particularly time-consuming.

What was done during the hackathon:

Uploaded real application documents (passport copies, application forms)

AI automatically recognized foreign nationals' names, passport numbers, and dates of birth

AI automatically calculated Taiwan participation ratios (must reach 50%)

On-site verification: AI recognition results vs manual cross-checking

User satisfaction: 7-10 out of 10. The biggest help was foreign national data recognition, significantly reducing data entry and verification time.

Follow-up: The Department Director personally secured 240K TWD in character pack funding and planned a 4.8M TWD renewal budget for the following fiscal year.

## Next Steps

Haven't built your question bank yet? — See Quality Question Bank

Ready to go live? — See Training & Optimization

---

## Training & Optimization
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/getting-started/training.html

# Training & Continuous Optimization

Our staff skews older — can they learn to use it? How do we keep using it after launch?

## Three Learning Methods

### Method 1: Self-Paced Learning

A fully self-guided course that requires no instructor.

Design features:

Single-page layout — just scroll down, you won't get lost

Opens with automatic guidance to the next step

Coach-style encouragement: real-time progress feedback in the sidebar

Gray-to-color certificate progress bar that keeps you motivated to finish

Video tutorial channels:

Botrun AI Platform Tutorial (https://www.youtube.com/@botrunai/videos)

Government AI Platform Tutorial (https://www.youtube.com/@TryAI%E7%84%A1%E4%BA%BA%E6%95%99%E5%AE%A4%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E6%95%99%E5%AD%B8)

### Method 2: On-Site Training (Instructor-Led)

Best for deploying across an entire department.

Real example — Ministry of Interior training plan:

Schedule: Late March to early April, 4 half-day sessions

Participants: 26 people

Content: AI Play platform operations + data analysis hands-on (using real CSV data)

Approach: Not a lecture — everyone opens their laptop and follows along

### Method 3: Three Required Courses

For teams that have already started using the platform, ensuring everyone reaches baseline competency.

Mindset Course: What can AI do and not do? How to collaborate with AI?

Hands-on Course: Four practical exercises (everyone must pass)

Advanced Course: How to build and maintain a Quality Question Bank

Assessment mechanism: Employees upload screen recordings, and AI automatically scores them. This ensures people don't just "attend the class" but actually "know how to use it."

## Continuous Optimization

### Preventing Usage Decline

Lesson from CPC Corporation: An 8M TWD project with 200 users saw noticeable usage decline three months after launch. The cause was a lack of ongoing usage monitoring after deployment.

Botrun's "Human-Centered Ambassador" mechanism:

Each deployment client is assigned a "Human-Centered Ambassador"

The ambassador's focus isn't cost control, but rather: "Do users enjoy using it? What difficulties are they facing?"

Regular usage data tracking with proactive issue detection

### Continuous Question Bank Optimization

The Quality Question Bank is not a one-and-done effort. As your business evolves, you need to:

Regularly add new business scenarios

Refine answer quality based on user feedback

Update evaluation criteria (regulatory changes, process adjustments)

## Scaling from One Department to the Entire Organization

Successful organizational scaling typically follows this path:

Pilot with a single department — Choose a department with clear pain points for a POC, quickly validate results

Quantify results — Present concrete numbers showing time and cost savings, let the results speak for themselves

Develop internal champions — Have people from the successful department help onboard other departments, lowering the adoption barrier

Secure resources from leadership — Present results at management meetings, drive cross-department budget allocation

## Next Steps

Haven't built your question bank? — See Quality Question Bank

Want to hold a hackathon? — See Hackathon Validation

---

## Features & Technical
URL: https://docs.botrun.ai/en/faq/advanced.html

# Features & Technical

## What file formats are supported?

The knowledge base supports: PDF, DOCX, CSV, and Excel. Uploaded files are converted to vector storage and retrieved using semantic search technology.

## What AI models are supported?

Botrun supports both open and commercial models:

| Type | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Open Models | e.g. Llama-4-Maverick, hosted at Taiwan's National Center for High-Performance Computing, free to use |
| Commercial Models | e.g. Claude Sonnet 4, Claude Haiku 4.5, paid |

Users can choose based on their needs when creating a Bot. Open models are suitable for general purposes; commercial models provide higher quality responses.

## What is the relationship between Botrun and TAIDE?

Botrun has integrated Taiwan's local TAIDE large language model, launching the taide-botrun fusion model:

Quality score improved from 4.6 to 8.4 (out of 10) after fusion

TAIDE is a Taiwan-made model supported by the National Science and Technology Council

Provides localized Traditional Chinese AI capabilities

## How is data security ensured?

Private cloud zone — isolated environment, separated from other customers

On-premises deployment — Docker-in-Docker isolation architecture, data stays entirely within the customer's facility

Multi-factor authentication (MFA) — supports TOTP, can be enforced

Enterprise SSO — integrates with enterprise identity systems

Government compliance — meets Taiwan Executive Yuan generative AI guidelines

## What features does the chat interface offer?

Beyond AI capabilities, the Botrun chat interface offers:

Voice input: hold the record button, speech is automatically transcribed

Flash voice mode: send immediately after recording, no preview needed

Real-time streaming: SSE streaming, responses appear word by word

File upload: drag-and-drop or click to upload (up to 200MB)

Tool execution viewer: expand to see which tools the AI used and how long they took

Copy and share: copy AI responses, share entire conversations (read-only link)

Conversation management: rename, delete, view history

Light/dark theme: switch between dark and light interface

## How can I get more accurate AI responses?

Botrun recommends using the COSTAR prompt framework:

| Element | Full Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| C | Context | Provide background information and context |
| O | Objective | Clearly state what you want to achieve |
| S | Style | Specify the writing or response style |
| T | Tone | Set the tone (formal, friendly, etc.) |
| A | Audience | Describe who the target audience is |
| R | Response | Specify the expected output format |

Clearer instructions → Better output quality → Less manual editing → Higher work efficiency
